failedAssertions.reason: Scroll-linked storytelling and atlas state drift out of sync in both directions. With atlas narrative headings for Product/Token/Revenue visible, the selected tab often remained on a later branch ('Social & Agent Ecosystem'), and scrolling back upward later snapped the selected tab to 'Revenue Expansion' instead of the visible earlier branch.

Branch state is not stable under interaction. After expanding both Product Evolution and Technical Infrastructure, selecting the Product child node 'Autonomous Strategy Agents' collapsed unrelated branch state and left the atlas focused on the wrong family, so changing one branch corrupted unrelated roadmap state even though leaf nodes themselves did not expose fake expand toggles.

Direct navigation to #node-pe-terminal-beta did restore the intended node and Product Evolution branch, and the same node reopened after refresh, but both the initial direct load and refresh triggered a visible React hydration mismatch/runtime issue in the page. The lower-left Next.js issue badge remained visible after the deep-link flow, so the deep link does not stay cleanly correct after refresh.
